questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно использует инверсию с 'little' (едва/почти не)?

choices.text: Little he knew what was coming.
He knew little what was coming.
Little did he know what was coming.
Did he know little what was coming.

questions.explanation: Слово 'little' в значении 'едва' требует инверсии: Little + auxiliary + subject.

questions.prompt: Выберите правильное предложение с конструкцией 'only after'.

choices.text: Only after the exam we reviewed the material.
Only after the exam did we review the material.
Only after the exam we did review the material.
Did we review the material only after the exam.

questions.explanation: Конструкция 'only after' требует инверсии: Only after + auxiliary + subject.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение верно использует инверсию с 'only when'?

choices.text: Only when the sun rose did we leave.
Only when the sun rose we left.
We left only when the sun rose.
Did we leave only when the sun rose.

questions.explanation: Конструкция 'only when' запускает инверсию в первой части предложения.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно отражает инверсию с 'little'?

choices.text: Little she expected the surprise.
She expected little the surprise.
Little did she expect the surprise.
Did she expect little the surprise.

questions.explanation: Слово 'little' в значении 'едва' требует инверсии: Little + auxiliary + subject.

choices.text: Only by working hard we succeeded.
Only by working hard did we succeed.
We succeeded only by working hard.
Did we succeed only by working hard.

questions.explanation: Конструкция 'only by' требует инверсии: Only by + auxiliary + subject.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение использует инверсию с 'only then'?

choices.text: Only then did he understand the problem.
Only then he understood the problem.
He understood only then the problem.
Did he understand only then the problem.

questions.explanation: Конструкция 'only then' запускает инверсию: Only then + auxiliary + subject.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант верно использует 'little' в инверсии?

choices.text: Little he saw the danger.
He saw little the danger.
Little did he see the danger.
Did he see little the danger.

questions.explanation: Слово 'little' в значении 'едва' требует инверсии: Little + auxiliary + subject.

choices.text: Only after the rain stopped we went out.
Only after the rain stopped did we go out.
We went out only after the rain stopped.
Did we go out only after the rain stopped.

questions.explanation: Конструкция 'only after' требует инверсии в первой части.

questions.prompt: Какое предложение правильно использует 'only when' с инверсией?

choices.text: Only when the bell rang did we enter.
Only when the bell rang we entered.
We entered only when the bell rang.
Did we enter only when the bell rang.

questions.explanation: Конструкция 'only when' требует инверсии: Only when + auxiliary + subject.

choices.text: Only by practicing daily did she improve.
Only by practicing daily she improved.
She improved only by practicing daily.
Did she improve only by practicing daily.

questions.explanation: Конструкция 'only by' запускает инверсию: Only by + auxiliary + subject.
